title: ReviewerEnvelope
description: Schema-validated JSON envelope emitted by peaks-reviewer (third-party reviewer). All LLM JSON output MUST validate against this shape; free-form LLM JSON is rejected. v2.14.0 G4 AC-4.2.

modelId.description: Concrete model identifier the provider was called with (e.g. 'claude-haiku-4-5', 'gpt-4o-mini', 'llama3.2:8b').

modelFamily.description: Provider family bucket derived from modelId. Used by A4.4 to enforce distinctness from karpathy-reviewer modelFamily. Examples: 'claude', 'gpt-4', 'gpt-3.5', 'llama', 'bedrock-claude', 'azure-openai'.

passed.description: True when reviewer found no blocking violations.

line.description: 1-based line number, or 0 when not file-anchored.

hint.description: Short hint describing the violation and fix direction.

violations.description: List of structured violations. Empty array when no findings.

gateAction.description: Recommended gate action for peaks request transition.

reason.description: One-sentence summary explaining the gateAction (e.g. 'no reviewer.providers configured; skipped via fallbackOnError=skip').
